clusters.title: U.S. fighter jet shot down by Iran as war escalates
clusters.neutral_headline: What we know about the US fighter jet shot down in Iran
bullet_summary: officials confirmed that an F-15E fighter jet went down over Iran
The White House has confirmed Donald Trump has been briefed on the shooting down of a US fighter jet in Iran
Iran's media is screening videos said to show US aircraft searching for the pilots of a US fighter jet shot down in Iran

items.title: U.S. fighter jet shot down by Iran as war escalates
items.standfirst: Iran shot down a U.S. fighter jet and one crew member was rescued by American forces as a search continues for a 2nd crew member, U.S. officials say.
items.content: Iran shot down a U.S. fighter jet and one crew member was rescued by American forces as a search continues for a 2nd crew member, U.S. officials say.

items.title: American fighter jet downed over Iran, 1 crew member rescued
items.standfirst: U.S. officials confirmed that an F-15E fighter jet went down over Iran.
items.content: U.S. officials confirmed that an F-15E fighter jet went down over Iran.

items.title: US fighter jet shot down over Iran
items.standfirst: Search under way for two crew members on the American F-15E aircraft
items.content: Search under way for two crew members on the American F-15E aircraft

items.title: Video appears to show US plane and search and rescue helicopters over southern Iran
items.standfirst: Reports from the US, quoting unnamed officials, say a search is under way after the shooting down of a US fighter jet over Iran.
items.content: Reports from the US, quoting unnamed officials, say a search is under way after the shooting down of a US fighter jet over Iran.

items.title: What we know about the US fighter jet shot down in Iran
items.standfirst: The White House has confirmed Donald Trump has been briefed on the shooting down of a US fighter jet in Iran.
items.content: The White House has confirmed Donald Trump has been briefed on the shooting down of a US fighter jet in Iran.

items.title: White House reacts to F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran
items.standfirst: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.
items.content: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

items.title: 1 crew member from F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran rescued, U.S. officials say
items.standfirst: Two U.S. officials tell CBS News that one crew member from the downed F-15E fighter jet has been rescued. CBS News' Aaron MacLean and Eleanor Watson report.
items.content: Two U.S. officials tell CBS News that one crew member from the downed F-15E fighter jet has been rescued. CBS News' Aaron MacLean and Eleanor Watson report.

items.title: Iran reacts to downed F-15 fighter jet
items.standfirst: Iran state media is reacting to news of an American F-15 fighter jet downed in the country. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Courtney Kealy have more.
items.content: Iran state media is reacting to news of an American F-15 fighter jet downed in the country. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Courtney Kealy have more.

items.title: Expert on F-15E fighter jet usually flown by 2 crew members
items.standfirst: CBS News analysit Aaron MacLean, a former senior fellow at Hudson Institute, joins with more details on the F-15E fighter jet that was downed in Iran, sources say.
items.content: CBS News analysit Aaron MacLean, a former senior fellow at Hudson Institute, joins with more details on the F-15E fighter jet that was downed in Iran, sources say.

items.title: Early details on F-15E fighter jet downed in Iran
items.standfirst: U.S. officials confirm to CBS News that an F-15E fighter jet was downed in Iran. A search and rescue mission is ongoing, sources say. CBS News' Elizabeth Palmer and Weijia Jiang report.
items.content: U.S. officials confirm to CBS News that an F-15E fighter jet was downed in Iran. A search and rescue mission is ongoing, sources say. CBS News' Elizabeth Palmer and Weijia Jiang report.

items.title: Iran release videos of US aircraft searching for pilots shot down in Iran
items.standfirst: Iran's media is screening videos said to show US aircraft searching for the pilots of a US fighter jet shot down in Iran
items.content: Iran's media is screening videos said to show US aircraft searching for the pilots of a US fighter jet shot down in Iran

items.title: One pilot rescued, one still missing after U.S. fighter jet downed in Iran
items.standfirst: One F-15E crew member was rescued and a search was underway for a second after a fighter jet went down over Iran, a U.S. official said Friday
items.content: One F-15E crew member was rescued and a search was underway for a second after a fighter jet went down over Iran, a U.S. official said Friday

items.title: American F-15 fighter jet downed over Iran, U.S. officials say | Special Report
items.standfirst: A search and rescue effort is underway after an American U.S. F-15 fighter jet was downed over Iran, two sources confirm to CBS News. Kelly O'Grady anchored this CBS News special report.
items.content: A search and rescue effort is underway after an American U.S. F-15 fighter jet was downed over Iran, two sources confirm to CBS News. Kelly O'Grady anchored this CBS News special report.

items.title: A U.S. jet goes down over Iran, a U.S. official confirms
items.standfirst: A U.S. official said that one crew member had been rescued and U.S. forces continue to search for the second crew member.
items.content: A U.S. official said that one crew member had been rescued and U.S. forces continue to search for the second crew member.(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)

clusters.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz

bullet_summary: Reported by BBC World, Al Jazeera, France24 and others

items.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
items.standfirst: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.content: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

items.title: French-owned container ship transits Hormuz Strait in first since Iran war
items.standfirst: CMA CGM's vessel becomes the first French-owned ship to traverse Hormuz since the US–Israel war on Iran began.
items.content: CMA CGM's vessel becomes the first French-owned ship to traverse Hormuz since the US–Israel war on Iran began.

items.title: French-owned CMA CGM container ship passes Strait of Hormuz
items.standfirst: A container ship belonging to French shipping group CMA CGM has passed through the Strait of Hormuz, ​MarineTraffic vessel ‌tracking data shows, in a sign that Iran may not consider France ⁠a hostile nation. It is the first French-owned vessel to ‌make it through the channel since US-Israeli attacks began on Iran at the end of ⁠February. Until the war led to the effective closure of the Strait, it was the route for about a fifth of global oil and liquefied natural gas supplies. FRANCE 24's International Affairs Commentator Douglas Herbert tells us more.
items.content: A container ship belonging to French shipping group CMA CGM has passed through the Strait of Hormuz, ​MarineTraffic vessel ‌tracking data shows, in a sign that Iran may not consider France ⁠a hostile nation. It is the first French-owned vessel to ‌make it through the channel since US-Israeli attacks began on Iran at the end of ⁠February. Until the war led to the effective closure of the Strait, it was the route for about a fifth of global oil and liquefied natural gas supplies. FRANCE 24's International Affairs Commentator Douglas Herbert tells us more.

items.title: French-owned container ship and three Omani tankers pass through Strait of Hormuz
items.standfirst: CMA CGM vessel is first owned by major western shipping line to make safe passage since Iran war began
items.content: CMA CGM vessel is first owned by major western shipping line to make safe passage since Iran war began

items.title: Employers added 178,000 jobs in March, blowing past forecasts

items.content: Hiring was much stronger than expected in March, with employers adding roughly three times the number of jobs economists predicted.

items.title: US jobs surge unexpectedly in March despite Iran war
items.standfirst: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.
items.content: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.

items.title: The labor market springs back to life in March as employers add 178,000 jobs
items.standfirst: The U.S. job market perked up last month as employers added 178,000 jobs. The unemployment rate dipped to 4.3%, mainly because the number of people seeking work declined.
items.content: The U.S. job market perked up last month as employers added 178,000 jobs. The unemployment rate dipped to 4.3%, mainly because the number of people seeking work declined. (Image credit: Joe Raedle)

items.content: Traore reneged on promises to hold elections and has since scrapped political parties in the country.

items.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
items.standfirst: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.
items.content: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

items.title: People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
items.standfirst: Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.Traoré took power in a coup in September 2022, toppling another junta that had taken power just nine months earlier. He has since stifled opposition and in January banned political parties outright. Continue reading...
items.content: Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.Traoré took power in a coup in September 2022, toppling another junta that had taken power just nine months earlier. He has since stifled opposition and in January banned political parties outright. Continue reading...

items.title: NASA's Artemis II Lifts Off | Bloomberg Artemis II Special 4/1/2026
items.standfirst: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Loren Grush bring special coverage of NASA's Artemis II launch live from Kennedy Space Center on Florida's Space Coast. NASA’s crew of astronauts launched to space and reached a stable orbit, kicking off a landmark journey that will take them closer to the lunar surface than anyone has been in more than 50 years. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Loren Grush bring special coverage of NASA's Artemis II launch live from Kennedy Space Center on Florida's Space Coast. NASA’s crew of astronauts launched to space and reached a stable orbit, kicking off a landmark journey that will take them closer to the lunar surface than anyone has been in more than 50 years. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Italy's head coach quits after team fails to qualify for World Cup
items.standfirst: Italy coach Gennaro Gattuso resigned on Friday, three days after failing to qualify the national team for the 2026 World Cup and one day after the announcement that Italian Football Federation (FIGC) president Gabriele Gravina was stepping down.
items.content: Italy coach Gennaro Gattuso resigned on Friday, three days after failing to qualify the national team for the 2026 World Cup and one day after the announcement that Italian Football Federation (FIGC) president Gabriele Gravina was stepping down.
